name: Memcached
description: Memcached schema from Censys Platform API

ascii_binding_protocol_enabled.description: Whether server responds to a handshake using the ASCII wire format of the protocol.

binary_binding_protocol_enabled.description: Whether server responds to a handshake using the binary wire format of the protocol.

responds_to_udp.description: Whether the server on the UDP port with the same number responds to a handshake using the ASCII wire format of the protocol.

stats.description: Server information returned in response to the stats command, as a set of key:value pairs.

version.description: The Memcached version indicated in the server's response.
